ddls:
CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the service location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the service location */,
  "amenity" TEXT /* Type of amenity or service offered */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the service type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the service */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the service */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the service */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the service */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the service */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the service type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, moderator, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the service being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the service the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_images_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hour entry */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the service the hours belong to */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (Monday-Sunday) */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the service on the given day */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the service on the given day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_hours_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the service the analytics belong to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g. views, clicks, ratings) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)
